sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْعَمَلُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ الْفَعَّالُ الْمُحَرِّكَ الَّذِي يَدْفَعُ الْمُؤَسَّسَاتِ الْكَبِيرَةَ نَحْوَ تَحْقِيقِ أَهْدَافِهَا.
sentences.translation: Efikasan timski rad smatra se motorom koji pokreće velike institucije ka ostvarenju njihovih ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: Effective teamwork is considered the engine that drives large organizations toward achieving their goals.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَتَوَاصَلُ أَعْضَاءُ الْفَرِيقِ بِانْفِتَاحٍ، يُمْكِنُهُمْ حَلُّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الْمُعَقَّدَةِ بِكَفَاءَةٍ أَكْبَرَ.
sentences.translation: Kada članovi tima komuniciraju otvoreno, mogu efikasnije rješavati složene probleme.
sentences.translationEn: When team members communicate openly, they can solve complex problems more efficiently.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَنَوُّعَ الْأَفْكَارِ دَاخِلَ الْفَرِيقِ يُعَزِّزُ الْإِبْدَاعَ وَيُؤَدِّي إِلَى حُلُولٍ مُبْتَكَرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Raznolikost ideja unutar tima podstiče kreativnost i vodi ka inovativnim rješenjima.
sentences.translationEn: Diversity of thought within a team fosters creativity and leads to innovative solutions.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى كُلِّ فَرْدٍ تَحَمُّلُ مَسْؤُولِيَّةِ جُزْئِهِ مَعَ دَعْمِ زُمَلَائِهِ عِنْدَ الْحَاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki pojedinac mora preuzeti odgovornost za svoj dio uz podršku kolegama kada je to potrebno.
sentences.translationEn: Each individual must take responsibility for their part while supporting their colleagues when needed.

sentences.arabic: تُبْنَى بِيئَةُ الْعَمَلِ الْإِيجَابِيَّةُ عَلَى الِاحْتِرَامِ الْمُتَبَادَلِ وَتَقَاسُمِ التَّقْدِيرِ لِلنَّجَاحَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Pozitivno radno okruženje gradi se na uzajamnom poštovanju i dijeljenju priznanja za uspjehe.
sentences.translationEn: A positive work environment is built on mutual respect and sharing credit for successes.
